title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.349 - Veterans Highway designated for a portion of State Highway J in Lincoln County
text:
227.349.  Veterans Highway designated for a portion of State Highway J in Lincoln County. — The portion of State Highway J in Lincoln County from the intersection of State Highway J and State Highway 47 to the intersection of State Highway J and State Highway U shall be named the "Veterans Highway".
(L. 2004 H.B. 1029 and H.B. 1438 and H.B. 1610)
